title: Macroclinium coffeicola
taxonomy: Macroclinium coffeicola is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is native to Central and South America, and its classification is as follows: it belongs to the genus Macroclinium, and the tribe Cranichideae. Within the family Orchidaceae, Macroclinium coffeicola is further classified as being part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. The classification of this orchid species follows a hierarchical system of classification, with kingdom, family, genus, species being the main levels. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Macroclinium coffeicola.
